ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geological_data" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company conducting the survey */,
  "collar_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the collar location of the survey */,
  "from_depth" REAL /* Depth from which the measurement starts */,
  "to_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement ends */,
  "attribute_column" TEXT /* Column representing geological attribute code */,
  "company_lithocode" TEXT /* Lithocode used by the company for categorizing lithology */,
  "company_lithology" TEXT /* Lithology classification according to the company */,
  "cet_lithology" TEXT /* Lithology classification according to CET standards */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality or relevance of the geological data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the survey */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample within the survey */,
  "geological_formation" TEXT /* Geological formation where the sample was taken */,
  "mineral_composition" TEXT /* Mineral composition of the sample */,
  "geological_age" TEXT /* Estimated age of the sample */,
  "analyzed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who analyzed the sample */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was analyzed */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geological_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company conducting the geological survey */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Company's phone number */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Company's physical address */,
  "company_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "company_specializations" TEXT /* Specializations or areas of expertise of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lithology_types" (
  "lithology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lithological type */,
  "lithology_name" TEXT /* Name of the lithology (e.g., hardpan, sandstone) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lithology type */,
  "mineral_composition" TEXT /* Typical mineral composition of the lithology type */,
  "geological_age_range" TEXT /* Typical age range of the lithology type */,
  "common_formations" TEXT /* Common geological formations where this lithology type is found */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the lithology type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lithology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company conducting the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the geological survey */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations from the survey */,
  "survey_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the survey */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* IDs of the team members involved in the survey */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the survey */,
  "survey_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the survey */,
  "survey_duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the survey in days */,
  "survey_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or objective of the survey */,
  "survey_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or findings of the survey */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
